subcodes.first_line: O ye who are inebriated with the draught of His Covenant! It is time to pass beyond the desolate wilds of remoteness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمستان پیمانه پیمان وقت آنست که بادیه هجران بپیمااید تا بسرمنزل جانان
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @music and singing, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
